title: Digital Strategy 2.0 – National Digital Development Framework
description: National-level digital strategy document from New Zealand's Ministry of Economic Development outlining the vision and framework for digital development across economy, environment, and society. Covers four pillars: connection, capability, confidence, and content, with emphasis on broadband infrastructure, digital skills, cybersecurity, and inclusive participation.
owner: Chief Digital Officer or Digital Strategy Office
